description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named rcc dev that runs on push to main and master branches, on pull requests to main and master, and on a scheduled cron job. Use a matrix job strategy to run R CMD check on different Ubuntu OS configurations with various R versions, setting up R, Pandoc, and required system dependencies. Install R packages, create a Postgres database, and run R CMD check with custom settings, uploading check results as an artifact on failure.
